core/apiKeys.name: API Keys
core/apiKeys.description: Define API keys for privileged access to the API.

core/automaticIntelUpdates.name: Automatic Intelligence Data Updates
core/automaticIntelUpdates.description: Automatically check for and download intelligence data updates.

core/automaticUpdates.name: Automatic Software Updates
core/automaticUpdates.description: Automatically check for and download software updates.

core/devMode.name: Development Mode
core/devMode.description: In Development Mode, security restrictions are lifted/softened.

core/enableProcessDetection.name: Process Detection
core/enableProcessDetection.description: This option enables the attribution of network traffic to processes.

core/expertiseLevel.name: UI Mode
core/expertiseLevel.description: Control the default amount of settings and information shown.

core/listenAddress.name: API Listen Address
core/listenAddress.description: Defines the IP address and port on which the internal API listens.

core/locale.name: Time and Date Format
core/locale.description: Configures the time and date format for the user interface.

core/metrics/instance.name: Metrics Instance Name
core/metrics/instance.description: Define the prometheus instance label for all exported metrics.

core/metrics/push.name: Push Prometheus Metrics
core/metrics/push.description: Push metrics to this URL in the prometheus format.

core/networkService.name: Network Service
core/networkService.description: Use the Portmaster as a network service.

core/releaseLevel.name: Feature Stability
core/releaseLevel.description: Decide if you want to experiment with unstable features.

core/useSystemNotifications.name: Desktop Notifications
core/useSystemNotifications.description: In addition to showing notifications in the Portmaster App, also send them to the Desktop.

dns/listenAddress.name: Internal DNS Server Listen Address
dns/listenAddress.description: Defines the IP address and port on which the internal DNS Server listens.

dns/nameserverRetryRate.name: Retry Failing DNS Servers
dns/nameserverRetryRate.description: Duration in seconds how often failing DNS server should be retried.

dns/nameservers.name: DNS Servers
dns/nameservers.description: DNS servers to use for resolving DNS requests.

dns/noAssignedNameservers.name: Ignore System/Network Servers
dns/noAssignedNameservers.description: Ignore DNS servers configured in your system or network.

dns/noInsecureProtocols.name: Use Secure Protocols Only
dns/noInsecureProtocols.description: Never resolve using insecure protocols, ie. plain DNS.

dns/noMulticastDNS.name: Ignore Multicast DNS
dns/noMulticastDNS.description: Do not resolve using Multicast DNS.

dns/useStaleCache.name: Always Use DNS Cache
dns/useStaleCache.description: Always use the DNS cache, even if entries have expired.

filter/askTimeout.name: Prompt Timeout
filter/askTimeout.description: How long the Portmaster will wait for a reply to a prompt notification.

filter/askWithSystemNotifications.name: Prompt Desktop Notifications
filter/askWithSystemNotifications.description: In addition to showing prompt notifications in the Portmaster App, also send them to the Desktop.

filter/blockInbound.name: Force Block Incoming Connections
filter/blockInbound.description: Connections initiated towards your device from the LAN or Internet.

filter/blockInternet.name: Force Block Internet Access
filter/blockInternet.description: Force Block connections from and to the Internet.

filter/blockLAN.name: Force Block LAN
filter/blockLAN.description: Force Block all connections from and to the Local Area Network.

filter/blockLocal.name: Force Block Device-Local Connections
filter/blockLocal.description: Force Block all internal connections on your own device.

filter/blockP2P.name: Force Block P2P/Direct Connections
filter/blockP2P.description: These are connections that are established directly to an IP address.

filter/customListFile.name: Custom Filter List
filter/customListFile.description: Specify the file path to a custom filter list (.txt).

filter/defaultAction.name: Default Network Action
filter/defaultAction.description: The default network action is applied when nothing else allows or blocks a connection.

filter/disableAutoPermit.name: Disable Auto Allow
filter/disableAutoPermit.description: Auto Allow searches for a relation between an app and the destination of a connection.

filter/dnsQueryInterception.name: Seamless DNS Integration
filter/dnsQueryInterception.description: Intercept and redirect astray DNS queries to the Portmaster's internal DNS server.

filter/domainHeuristics.name: Enable Domain Heuristics
filter/domainHeuristics.description: Checks for suspicious domain names and blocks them.

filter/enable.name: Enable Privacy Filter
filter/enable.description: Enable the Privacy Filter. If turned off, all privacy filter protections are fully disabled.

filter/endpoints.name: Outgoing Rules
filter/endpoints.description: Rules that apply to outgoing network connections.

filter/includeCNAMEs.name: Block Domain Aliases
filter/includeCNAMEs.description: Block a domain if a resolved CNAME (alias) is blocked by a rule.

filter/includeSubdomains.name: Block Subdomains of Filter List Entries
filter/includeSubdomains.description: Additionally block all subdomains of entries in selected filter lists.

filter/lists.name: Filter Lists
filter/lists.description: Block connections that match enabled filter lists.

filter/permanentVerdicts.name: Permanent Verdicts
filter/permanentVerdicts.description: Making these verdicts permanent brings a major performance increase.

filter/preventBypassing.name: Block Secure DNS Bypassing
filter/preventBypassing.description: Prevent apps from bypassing Portmaster's Secure DNS resolver.

filter/removeBlockedDNS.name: Reject Blocked IPs
filter/removeBlockedDNS.description: Reject blocked IP addresses directly from the DNS response.

filter/removeOutOfScopeDNS.name: Enforce Global/Private Split-View
filter/removeOutOfScopeDNS.description: Reject private IP addresses from public DNS responses.

filter/serviceEndpoints.name: Incoming Rules
filter/serviceEndpoints.description: Rules that apply to incoming network connections.

history/enable.name: Enable Network History
history/enable.description: Save connections in a database to view and search them later.

history/keep.name: Keep Network History
history/keep.description: Specify how many days the network history data should be kept.

spn/dnsExitPolicy.name: DNS Exit Node Rules
spn/dnsExitPolicy.description: Customize which countries should be used as DNS Exit Nodes.

spn/enable.name: SPN Module
spn/enable.description: Start the Safing Privacy Network module.

spn/exitHubPolicy.name: Exit Node Rules
spn/exitHubPolicy.description: Customize which countries should be used for your Exit Nodes.

spn/homePolicy.name: Home Node Rules
spn/homePolicy.description: Customize which countries should be used for your Home Node.

spn/routingAlgorithm.name: Select SPN Routing Algorithm
spn/routingAlgorithm.description: Select the routing algorithm for your connections through the SPN.

spn/specialAccessCode.name: Special Access Code
spn/specialAccessCode.description: Special Access Codes grant access to the SPN for testing.

spn/transitHubPolicy.name: Transit Node Rules
spn/transitHubPolicy.description: Customize which countries should be used as Transit Nodes.

spn/trustNodes.name: Trust Nodes
spn/trustNodes.description: Specify which community nodes to additionally trust.

spn/usagePolicy.name: SPN Rules
spn/usagePolicy.description: Customize which websites should be routed through the SPN.

spn/use.name: Use SPN
spn/use.description: Protect network traffic with the Safing Privacy Network.

spn/useCommunityNodes.name: Use Community Nodes
spn/useCommunityNodes.description: Use nodes (servers) not operated by Safing themselves.
